current_focus: Maintain trace/eval/cost/runtime-warning quality loop while keeping external exporters optional and safe.

tasks.title: Prevent runtime options from leaking to model providers
tasks.description: Finish the local fix that adds trace and runtime_warnings to RUNTIME_OPTION_KEYS. Add tests so internal runtime namespaces stay out of provider-facing options.
tasks.verify: PYTHONPATH=src:src/tests python -m unittest src/tests/test_context_budget.py && PYTHONPATH=src:src/tests python -m unittest discover -s src/tests -p 'test_*.py'

tasks.title: Make ContextPackBuilder the single model-message assembly path
tasks.description: Map all model-message assembly paths and move remaining paths behind ContextPackBuilder. Keep provider-specific materialization after context assembly.

tasks.title: Wire persistent session storage into the main loop
tasks.description: Persist run start, step finish, pause, resume, and compaction state so runs can be recovered and audited across sessions.

tasks.title: Run real local model gateway smoke
tasks.description: Replace the temporary localhost smoke with a real OpenAI-compatible gateway smoke once a valid local API key is available.
tasks.blocked_by: Missing valid local gateway API key for 127.0.0.1:8080.
tasks.verify: Run one AgentLoop call through the local gateway and check trace summary status=completed and model_call_count=1.

tasks.title: Trace MCP discovery and tools/list lifecycle
tasks.description: Add observation events around MCP connect, tools/list, refresh, failures, and cache behavior. Preserve redaction for credentials.

tasks.title: Unify artifact tracking
tasks.description: Define artifact kinds and record artifacts consistently from file tools, eval reports, trace exports, and benchmark outputs.

tasks.title: Add stable eval suite CLI
tasks.description: Add python -m openagent.core.eval run with cases glob, output dir, baseline report, regression thresholds, and optional CI gate.

tasks.title: Add deterministic record-replay for external integration tests
tasks.description: Add cassette support only for model, MCP, or HTTP tool integration tests that require deterministic external traffic.

tasks.title: Design file-backed trace/eval index before database storage
tasks.description: Define a read-only index over run id, case id, status, model/tool counts, cost, latency, and warning count before adding DB storage.

tasks.title: Add Langfuse real smoke runbook
tasks.description: Keep fake-client unit tests as default CI and add an env-gated manual smoke for real Langfuse trace plus score upload.
tasks.verify: Run an eval case with Langfuse enabled and confirm one trace plus four scores in Langfuse UI.

tasks.title: Guard against LangSmith reintroduction
tasks.description: Keep LangSmith removed unless there is a new explicit decision. Scan for LangSmith and OpenTelemetry terms before releases.
tasks.verify: rg -n "LangSmith|langsmith|LANGSMITH|opentelemetry|OTLP|otel" pyproject.toml doc src/openagent src/tests || true

tasks.title: Calibrate runtime warning thresholds
tasks.description: Tune warning thresholds from actual eval runs so context, token, and cost warnings are actionable rather than noisy.

tasks.title: Split optional dependencies by integration path
tasks.description: Review pyproject extras and split MCP, sandbox, benchmark, and Langfuse dependencies so installs stay minimal.

tasks.title: Publish reproducible benchmark reports
tasks.description: Define Terminal-Bench and Harbor report schema with command, environment, model, cost, latency, pass/fail, and trace path.

tasks.title: Keep CLI and Web Console outside core
tasks.description: When rebuilding CLI or Web Console, put them in a separate demo package with sanitized config templates, not inside the runtime core.

tasks.title: Strengthen exporter data-boundary tests
tasks.description: Add tests for secret redaction, metadata-only default export, and explicit content opt-in for every exporter.

tasks.title: Add adaptive step budgeting and closeout protection
tasks.description: Document and then improve max_steps behavior so complex tasks do not exhaust tool-enabled rounds before edits, reports, or verification can be completed.

tasks.title: Define the agent-agnostic AgentRunner protocol
tasks.description: Standalone swarm kernel (see doc/multi-agent.md). Create package src/swarm/ with zero openagent imports. Define AgentRunner / AgentSpec / AgentResult / AgentDescriptor / AgentRunHandle / RunContext / RunLimits / FanoutBudget. Validate the four-part spec contract (objective, output_schema, context, boundaries). CI must assert no openagent import under src/swarm/.
tasks.verify: PYTHONPATH=src:src/tests python -m unittest discover -s src/tests -p 'test_swarm_*.py' && (rg -n 'import openagent|from openagent' src/swarm || echo 'kernel boundary clean')

tasks.title: Add Supervisor topology, scheduler, and FanoutBudget
tasks.description: Kernel Phase 0. Implement a Registry of runners keyed by AgentDescriptor, a Scheduler with bounded concurrency, a Supervisor topology that dispatches AgentSpecs and aggregates AgentResults, and FanoutBudget enforcement (max concurrent, max total workers, aggregate token/cost). A failing runner yields a status-tagged partial result and never raises.

tasks.title: Add agent-agnostic trace lineage and capability routing
tasks.description: Kernel Phase 1. Own a swarm-level span tree with span_id/parent_span_id; each runner nests under its spawn span. Metadata-only by default with content opt-in (OA-016 rule). Use AgentDescriptor for routing (role match, cost tier, context size, streaming).

tasks.title: Add SubprocessRunner
tasks.description: Kernel Phase 2. A runner that drives any CLI agent over stdio JSON (e.g. openagent run --json). Maps the four-part spec to the child's input and the child's output back to AgentResult. This is the first out-of-process runner.

tasks.title: Add HttpRunner / A2ARunner
tasks.description: Kernel Phase 2. A runner that drives remote agent endpoints over HTTP, aligned with the A2A Agent Card capability model. Unlocks mixed-vendor heterogeneous swarms (openagent + external agents).

tasks.title: Add Hierarchical topology, structured handoff, and reviewer role
tasks.description: Kernel Phase 3. Hierarchical role chains (Researcher->Builder->Reviewer), a structured handoff schema (summary/evidence/open_questions/confidence/tool_state), ping-pong loop detection, a reviewer/critic role for adversarial verification, and a file-concurrency policy (worktree or directory ownership) for write-capable runners.

tasks.title: Add topology-agnostic LLM-as-judge eval harness
tasks.description: Kernel Phase 1. Multi-agent has no single correct path; add LLM-as-judge plus rubric evals over swarm outputs (extends openagent OA-007/OA-012 thinking). Required before any write-capable runners land.

tasks.title: Add persistent team Store protocol and optional decentralized swarm
tasks.description: Kernel Phase 4. Define a Store protocol for persisting lead/worker team state for cross-session pause/resume, plus an optional Decentralized peer-handoff topology with ping-pong detection. Backends are supplied by adapters.

tasks.title: Implement OpenAgentRunner (in-process swarm adapter)
tasks.description: OpenAgent reference adapter for the swarm kernel. Implement AgentRunner over AgentLoop: build a Session and an AgentLoop with mode=subagent, tools=readonly, lead model, READONLY permissions; map loop stream events to kernel AgentEvents; produce a structured AgentResult. No writes, no nesting, no persistence.
tasks.verify: PYTHONPATH=src:src/tests python -m unittest src/tests/test_loop.py && PYTHONPATH=src:src/tests python -m unittest discover -s src/tests -p 'test_*.py'

tasks.title: Add spawn_agent tool delegating to the swarm kernel
tasks.description: Inject a kernel client handle into ToolContext.extra['swarm'] at loop construction (backward-compatible, no global singleton). Add a spawn_agent builtin tool that submits AgentSpecs to the kernel and returns the AgentResult as compact JSON. Respect OA-017 closeout: disable spawning on the lead's final tool-enabled step.

tasks.title: Map openagent trace events into kernel lineage
tasks.description: Forward openagent run/step/tool trace events through the OpenAgentRunner into the kernel span tree so spawned workers carry parent_span_id linking to the lead span. Preserve metadata-only default and credential redaction.

tasks.title: Implement the kernel Store via persistent session storage
tasks.description: OpenAgent side of swarm Phase 4. Back the kernel Store protocol with persistent session storage so team state survives across sessions, and add a shared blackboard memory pool (ContextItem kind=blackboard, source=agent_id).
